name: secureshare
description: Free, open-source one-time secret sharing with AES-256 end-to-end encryption

scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: tsc -p tsconfig.frontend.json && cp src/frontend/*.html dist/frontend/ && cp src/frontend/*.png dist/frontend/frontend/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/frontend/*.js dist/frontend/frontend/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/frontend/*.svg dist/frontend/frontend/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/frontend/*.ico dist/frontend/frontend/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging
